channel.title: Commonplace on Picnic Spoons
channel.description: Recent content in Commonplace on Picnic Spoons

item.title: Book of Centuries
item.description: A reflection on historical memory, timelines, and the strange experience of placing lives, events, and ideas beside one another across centuries.

item.title: Field Notebooks
item.description: Thoughts on, and examples of, notes from out in the field. Collections of musings, sketches, facts, observations, and impressions.
